summary: The Goshen Township Board of Trustees held a special meeting public hearing on zoning case ZZ2022-006, a major adjustment to an approved PUD (Planned Unit Development) for the Lakefield Place development on State Route 132. The township zoning staff presented the case, noting the Zoning Commission had recommended approval with conditions by a 3-0 vote. The Board discussed lot sizes, a proposed 2.4-acre pond feature, and ultimately approved the major adjustment. The meeting adjourned at 6:20 PM.
decisions: Motion to adopt the agenda passed (Hodges yes, Hauserman yes)
Zoning case ZZ2022-006 major adjustment to PUD for Lakefield Place approved with conditions (Hodges yes, Hauserman yes)
Motion to adjourn passed (Hodges yes, Hauserman yes)
action_items: Applicant (Second Lakefield Place Development LLC / Abercrombie & Associates / Scott Humphries) to follow steps required by Section 6.02 for preliminary and final development plan approvals
Applicant to ensure all proposed buildings meet already approved building setback lines
Previous conditions of approval and layout to remain for lots other than 115 through 157
key_amounts: Minimum PUD lot size standard: 5,000 sq ft
Minimum lot size in this development: approximately 8,000 sq ft
Lot sizes range from approximately 8,000 sq ft to over 20,000 sq ft
notable_topics: Public hearing on zoning case ZZ2022-006 - major adjustment to approved PUD for Lakefield Place development
Zoning Commission recommendation of approval with conditions (3-0 vote)
Lot size consistency and compliance with PUD standards
Proposed 2.4-acre pond/lake feature and amenity recommendations including water fountain and aerators
Drainage considerations related to Clermont County clay soil
notes: Trustee Allen was absent. The transcript has significant portions of garbled or auto-generated text, likely due to poor audio quality or OCR artifacts. The Zoning Commission had previously recommended approval 3-0. The Clermont County Planning Commission was noted as not being part of the approving body at the major adjustment stage but would review at preliminary and final development plan stages. Board members suggested adding a water fountain and aerators to the proposed pond as a recommendation to the developer.
title: BOT Special Meeting 11.29.22.mp4
